content: Self-Refine’s stateless iterative output refinement and Reflexion’s persistent dynamic self-reflection memory can be combined to create a hybrid autonomous refinement agent that adapts its self-feedback standards over time, rather than starting from a blank self-evaluation prompt with every iteration. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while gaining Reflexion’s ability to accumulate structural self-insight across tasks.
